nasb.text: And you shall wash your clothes on the seventh day and be clean, and afterward you may enter the camp.”

esv.text: You must wash your clothes on the seventh day, and you shall be clean. And afterward you may come into the camp.”

cnv.text: 第七日，你們要洗衣服，就為潔淨；然後才可以進營。”

ccb.text: 第七天，你们洗完衣服后就洁净了，可以回营。”
